## Summary

Describe the change and the user workflow or analyzer behavior it affects.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, or explain why a command was not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Real evidence files or recovered private payloads are not committed.
- [ ] Frontend and Rust/Tauri boundaries remain clear.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for user-facing behavior.
- [ ] Relevant Rust, frontend, or build validation was run.
